title: It Takes a Village: Understanding Cost Share on Sponsored Projects — eTraining Module
display_label: Cost Share on Sponsored Projects eTraining (Articulate Rise)
content: Self-paced Articulate Rise module that explains cost sharing on sponsored projects — the portion of total project costs not funded by the granting agency and instead provided by MSU or a third party through cash or in-kind contributions. Covers the different types of cost share, the step-by-step process for getting approvals and documentation right, practical tips for tracking from day one, and how to use the project's Banner cost share activity code.
